scripts.dev: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && concurrently "bun run dev:renderer" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:main && bun run build:preload
scripts.build:renderer: bun build src/renderer/main.ts --outdir dist/renderer --target browser && bun build src/renderer/output.ts --outdir dist/renderer --target browser && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/output.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/ && cp -r src/renderer/shaders dist/renderer/
scripts.build:main: bun build src/main/main.ts --outdir dist/main --target node --external electron --format cjs
scripts.build:preload: bun build src/preload/preload.ts --outdir dist/preload --target node --external electron --format cjs && bun build src/preload/output-preload.ts --outdir dist/preload --target node --external electron --format cjs
